query:
-- Total revenue now captured via service_billing_assignments
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT sba.serviceExternalId) as services_with_revenue,
  SUM(bi.lineAmount) as total_revenue
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN billing_items bi ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
WHERE bi.lineAmount > 0;
